stories.title: Extreme Heat Threatens Players and Fans at 2026 FIFA World Cup
stories.desc: Researchers warn that rising temperatures could pose significant threats to players and fans as the 2026 FIFA World Cup kicks off in June across North America.

stories.title: FOX Sports Launches 'Dream Big' Campaign for World Cup 2026
stories.desc: FOX Sports debuts star-studded commercial featuring USMNT players, Tom Brady, and Zlatan Ibrahimović with Elvis Presley's 'The Impossible Dream' as the tournament approaches.

stories.title: World Cup Group Stage Games Still Have Unsold Tickets at High Prices
stories.desc: With under 40 days to go, many group-stage matches including USA vs Paraguay opener still have tickets available, with prices ranging from $380 to over $6,000 amid fan complaints about dynamic pricing.

stories.title: World Cup 2026 Drives Rising Global Tourism Demand Across Host Nations
stories.desc: The FIFA World Cup 2026 is reshaping tourism across the US, Canada, and Mexico, with rising demand, soaring hotel prices, and connectivity challenges as host cities prepare for visitors.

stories.title: Panini Launches Biggest-Ever World Cup Sticker Album with 980 Stickers
stories.desc: Panini officially launched its record-breaking 2026 FIFA World Cup sticker album on April 28 at Wembley Stadium, featuring 980 stickers including 68 special edition stickers and a Coca-Cola partnership section.

stories.title: World Cup Sticker Album Now Available at Major US Retailers
stories.desc: The 112-page Panini sticker album is now available at Walmart, Target, Amazon, and other retailers for $5, with individual 7-sticker packets costing $2, as collectors face the challenge of completing the largest edition ever.
